The trace exhibits several issues, including disobeying task specifications (agents providing incomplete code or simplified implementations instead of the requested functionality), weak verification (lack of thorough testing and validation), task derailment (proposing irrelevant solutions or focusing on incorrect aspects of the problem), information withholding (providing incomplete information or failing to share relevant findings), action-reasoning mismatch (proposing actions that don't align with the stated reasoning), step repetition (repeating the same thought or information multiple times), loss of conversation history (agents seemingly forgetting previous interactions), premature termination (stopping the task before completion), ignoring other agent's suggestions (continuing despite receiving feedback indicating a problem), and unaware of termination conditions (continuing to ask for solutions when the problem is unsolvable with the given information).
